title: Another Flashlight Mod
body:
This mod introduces two new flashlights: the flashlight and the shakelight (Inspired by Doors 🚪).

# <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/t2cwfrW5OdY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Here's how to use the flashlights 🔦 :



Shakelight : You can shake the Shakelight by pressing the default key R  **YOU CAN CHANGE IT IN THE SETTINGS IN THE GAMEPLAY SECTION ​.
**


Flashlight​ : To charge the Flashlight, hold the battery in o ne hand and the flashlight in the other, then right-click, and the flashlight should be charged.



The animations are not compatible with Minecraft 1.19.2.
Do not use playeranimator with this version.

[THIS MOD REQUIRES PLAYERANIMATOR](https://modrinth.com/mod/playeranimator)

**CONFIGURATION**

A file named LightDistance.toml and another named BatteryDuration.toml will be generated in the config folder.





You’re completely free to use this mod in your modpacks if you wish and don’t forget to leave feedback!
